body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15123518?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/da7om85", "id": 15123518, "login": "da7om85", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE1MTIzNTE4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/da7om85", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46426", "cvss": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-434", "name": "Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type"}], "description": "### Summary The file upload endpoint `POST /api/attachments/process` does not enforce active-content restrictions for authenticated users. The checks for dangerous file extensions (`html`, `svg`, `js`, `php`, etc.) are conditionally wrapped inside `if (isPublicUser)` or `if (isPublicUser || !env.SELF_HOSTED)`, meaning any authenticated builder can upload executable web content — SVG files with inline ` ------WebKitFormBoundaryXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX-- ``` ```json HTTP/1.1 200 OK [{"size":207,"name":"xss.svg","url":"http://target:10000/files/signed/.../.svg?X-Amz-...","extension":"svg","key":"workspace_id/attachments/.svg"}] ``` ### Impact * App end users - Stored XSS on any screen containing the attachment URL. Session cookie theft → full account takeover. | * Builder accounts - If malicious URL is shared within the workspace (table attachment, embedded image), XSS fires in builder's session → workspace takeover. -------- Discovered By: Abdulrahman Albatel Abdullah Alrasheed", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00175, "percentile": 0.07161}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T16:31:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46426"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T18:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T16:31:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Budibase/budibase/security/advisories/GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf", "https://github.com/Budibase/budibase/releases/tag/3.38.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46426", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Budibase/budibase/security-advisories/GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Budibase/budibase", "summary": "Budibase: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:51:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-82rc-gxrg-v4gf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.38.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "budibase"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.38.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Budibase: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
